name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states


    [i \in 1..N] /\ states[i] = "thinking" => states[i] = "hungry";
    (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
    [i \in 1..N] /\ states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0 => forks[i] = i /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = i /\ states[i] = "eating";
    (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
    [i \in 1..N] /\ states[i] = "eating" => forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0 /\ states[i] = "thinking";
  end
end
*)

(* State variables *)

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ states[i] = "thinking" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
    => states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks
  \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
    => states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
  \/ /\ states[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = i
    => states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
  \/ /\ states' = states /\ forks' = forks

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery
    \* wait until all processes with smaller numbers have exited
    \* or if numbers equal, wait until process with smaller index has exited
    \* (i.e., if num[j] < num[i] or (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))
    \* then enter critical section
    \* (critical section omitted)

  exit(i) == \* process i exits critical section


  Next == \* any process can choose a number, enter, or exit
    \E i \in 1..N:
      \E action \in {choose(i), enter(i), exit(i)}:
        action
*)

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          \E action \in {choose(i), enter(i), exit(i)}:
            action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head and tail indices indicating the positions for dequeue and enqueue, respectively. *)
Init == 
  /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> 0]
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

(* The producer action enqueues an item when the queue is not full. *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* The consumer action dequeues an item when the queue is not empty. *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next action is either Producer or Consumer. *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel = Append(channel, [chunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> chunk])
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, [chunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> chunk])
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ channel' = <<>>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, [chunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> chunk])
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 1)
    /\ channel' = <<>>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys, Txns, Values

VARIABLES db, txns, txnState, txnReadSet, txnWriteSet, txnWriteVals, t
TxnState == {"active", "committed", "aborted"}

\* The initial state: empty database, no active transactions
Init == /\ db = <<>>
       /\ txns = {}
       /\ txnState = [t \in Txns |-> "active"]
       /\ txnReadSet = [t \in Txns |-> {}]
       /\ txnWriteSet = [t \in Txns |-> {}]
       /\ txnWriteVals = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>]

\* The next-state relation
Next == 
  \E t \in Txns :
    /\ txnState[t] = "active"
    /\ \E op \in {"begin", "read", "write", "commit", "abort"} :
      /\ op = "begin" /\ txnState[t] = "active" /\ txnReadSet[t] = {} /\ txnWriteSet[t] = {} /\ txnWriteVals[t] = <<>>
      \/ op = "read" /\ \E k \in Keys :
          /\ k \in Keys
          /\ txnReadSet[t] = txnReadSet[t] \cup {k}
          /\ \E v \in Values : db[k] = v
      \/ op = "write" /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ k \in Keys
          /\ v \in Values
          /\ txnWriteSet[t] = txnWriteSet[t] \cup {k}
          /\ txnWriteVals[t] = [txnWriteVals[t] \cup {k \in Values : v}]
      \/ op = "commit" /\ \E t' \in Txns :
          /\ t' \in Txns
          /\ txnState[t'] = "active"
          /\ txnWriteSet[t'] \cap txnWriteSet[t] = {}
          /\ txnState[t] = "committed"
          /\ db' = [db \cup txnWriteVals[t]]
      \/ op = "abort" /\ txnState[t] = "aborted"

\* The specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, txnState, txnReadSet, txnWriteSet, txnWriteVals>>

\* Type invariants
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ txns \subseteq Txns
          /\ txnState \in [Txns -> TxnState]
          /\ txnReadSet \in [Txns -> [Keys -> BOOLEAN]]
          /\ txnWriteSet \in [Txns -> [Keys -> BOOLEAN]]
          /\ txnWriteVals \in [Txns -> [Keys -> Values]]

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[i])]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => clocks'[j] = clocks[j]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => offsets'[j] = offsets[j]
        /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Avg(c) == (1 \div N) * Sum(i \in 1..N : c[i])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
